lede: A look at May 6 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Prince Archie of Sussex and Cameron Heyward, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: The Last One (Friends)
events.desc: The final episode of the television sitcom Friends is aired.

events.title: Steve Jobs
events.desc: Steve Jobs of Apple Inc. unveils the first iMac.

events.title: Widerøe Flight 710
events.desc: All thirty-six passengers and crew are killed when Widerøe Flight 710 crashes into Mt. Torghatten in Brønnøy.

events.title: 1976 Friuli earthquake
events.desc: The 6.5 Mw Friuli earthquake affects Northern Italy with a maximum Mercalli intensity of X (Extreme), leaving 900–978 dead and 1,700–2,400 injured.

events.title: 60th anniversary of the Armenian genocide commemorations in Beirut
events.desc: During a lull in fighting, 100,000 Armenians gather in Beirut for the 60th anniversary commemorations of the Armenian genocide.

events.title: World War II
events.desc: World War II: On Corregidor, the last American forces in the Philippines surrender to the Japanese.

events.title: Imperial Trans-Antarctic Expedition
events.desc: Imperial Trans-Antarctic Expedition: The SY Aurora breaks loose from its anchorage during a gale, beginning a 312-day ordeal.

events.title: Thomas Henry Burke (civil servant)
events.desc: Thomas Henry Burke and Lord Frederick Cavendish are stabbed to death by Fenian assassins in Phoenix Park, Dublin.

events.title: Grand Palace
events.desc: Construction begins on the Grand Palace, the royal residence of the King of Siam in Bangkok, at the command of King Buddha Yodfa Chulaloke.

events.title: Christopher Smart
events.desc: English poet Christopher Smart is admitted into St Luke's Hospital for Lunatics in London, beginning his six-year confinement to mental asylums.

deaths.text: Thomas Henry Burke (civil servant), Irish civil servant
Charles FitzRoy, 2nd Duke of Grafton, English politician, Lord Lieutenant of Ireland

observances.text: Christian feast day: Evodius of Antioch (Roman Catholic Church)
Christian feast day: Jacinto Vera (Roman Catholic Church)
Christian feast day: Blessed Maria Caterina Troiani
Christian feast day: Petronax of Monte Cassino
